about.title: About Me
about.summary: As a Software Engineer, I develop AI agents based on LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex. During my internship at Havelsan, I gained experience in hallucination reduction and model monitoring by benchmarking the technical and ethical performance of modern AI models. While strengthening my OOP foundation with C++ and Java, I aim to build scalable AI solutions with Python, FastAPI, and SQL.
